narrative: Emergency exploratory laparotomy. Baseline count was not documented before incision due to time pressure. Scrub tech relief occurred during the case but no relief-count was performed. Closing-cavity count showed 1 missing sponge — incorrect final count. Search of field, drapes, and trash failed to find it. Surgeon attempted to override count discrepancy without documented reason and requested transport to PACU. No intra-operative imaging performed despite retained item suspected. Patient leaves OR with discrepancy unreconciled — NO transport should occur until imaging is completed. Final skin-closure count not documented in EHR.
